risks.title: Autopilot health is degraded
risks.impact: Any 'latest' report may actually be stale, partial, or failed output.
risks.action: Gate report generation on a healthy pipeline status and explicit run success.

risks.title: No durable audit run lineage exists
risks.impact: Claims cannot be traced back to prompt, model, source set, or execution run.
risks.action: Persist run ids, prompt hashes, model ids, source ids, and output artifacts for every report.

risks.title: AI-generated analysis is mixed into the evidence store
evidence: Examples include source titles containing зҫӨжұҮжҖ»еҲҶжһҗ or ClaudeеҲҶжһҗжңәеҷЁдәә
risks.impact: Later reports can end up summarizing prior AI output instead of first-order evidence.
risks.action: Separate analysis outputs from raw evidence tables and exclude them from retrieval by default.

risks.title: Department history contains empty or near-empty records
risks.impact: Trend and department assessments can be driven by placeholder records instead of real content.
risks.action: Reject low-content history rows from department analysis until repaired or enriched.

risks.title: Noise and system chatter are mixed into business evidence
risks.impact: The model can mistake group operations, UI chrome, and support widgets for business progress.
risks.action: Classify and strip system events/UI chrome before any summarization step.

risks.title: Encoding pollution exists in source metadata
risks.impact: Deduplication, grouping, and attribution become unreliable.
risks.action: Repair encoding issues before those rows participate in retrieval or aggregation.

risks.title: Secondary AI meeting summaries exist in source documents
evidence: AI summary / caution marker hits in source_documents = 6
risks.impact: These documents can still be useful, but only as secondary evidence with lower confidence.
risks.action: Label them as secondary evidence and require first-order confirmation for management conclusions.

operator_message: The current snapshot is not a healthy runnable reporting pipeline. Python cannot open run_incremental_cycle.py / run_history_backfill.py due to path encoding issues.
